headlines.title: NASA Tests New Refuel Device for Future In-Space Refueling Missions
headlines.summary: For NASA’s next generation of deep space exploration missions, spacecraft may need to refuel in Earth orbit before pushing farther into the solar system. Similar to how a gas pump needs a nozzle to fit your fuel tank, fu
